The big promise

This Is Not Just a Music Class. It Is a 90-Day Performance Challenge.

At OTS, students do not just learn songs in a classroom. They train with a clear goal: to perform live on the streets within 90 days.

Start My 90-Day Journey

Every student gets structure, support, accountability, and a community that helps them stay consistent. No more quitting after week two. OTS keeps the rhythm moving.

Who it is for

Built for People Who Always Wanted to Learn Music, But Never Started

OTS is for beginners, shy performers, busy students, working professionals, and anyone who wants to finally build the confidence to play in front of people.

01

I have never played before

02

I am scared to perform

03

I tried learning online but quit

04

I need someone to push me

05

I want music to become part of my life

Your 90-day roadmap

Three Months. One Clear Transformation.

Each month has a job. You learn, build confidence, then perform with your OTS crew.

Month 1

Learn the Basics

Build your foundation, understand your instrument, and start playing simple songs with a practice routine you can actually follow.

Month 2

Build Confidence

Practice with structure, get teacher feedback, join weekend group sessions, and prepare your first performance set.

Month 3

Perform Live

Polish your songs, work through stage fear, and perform on the streets with support around you.

You do not need to be perfect. You need to be ready. We will get you there.

What students get

Everything You Need to Stay Consistent

OTS is built around accountability. You get the people, tools, and pressure that make practice feel possible every week.

DC

Daily Check-Ins

Every day, students check in with progress, practice updates, and small goals. No disappearing. No losing momentum.

AP

Dedicated App

Students get access to the OTS app for lessons, tasks, reminders, progress tracking, and updates.

TC

Call a Teacher Anytime

Stuck on a chord? Confused about rhythm? Nervous before practice? Call a teacher and get help when you need it.

WG

Weekend Group Classes

Every weekend, students practice, perform, learn, and build confidence together as a group.

SP

Street Performance Preparation

We do not just teach music. We train you to perform in the real world with real people watching.

MB

Money-Back Guarantee

If you show up, follow the program, and still do not see progress, your progress is protected.

Founder message

A Message From the Founder

Most people do not need another boring class. They need a goal, a community, and someone to keep them accountable until confidence becomes normal.

Music should be performed, shared, and experienced.
You do not need confidence on day one. OTS builds that with you.
If you commit to the process, OTS commits to getting you performance-ready.

Join Risk-Free
FAQ

Questions Before You Join?

Do I need music experience?

No. OTS is beginner-friendly.

What if I am shy?

That is exactly why the program exists. OTS helps you build confidence slowly, then prepares you to perform.

What happens in 90 days?

You work toward performing live on the streets with your group or as an individual performer.

Can I talk to a teacher outside class?

Yes. Students can call a teacher anytime for support.

Are there group classes?

Yes. Group classes happen every weekend.

Is there an app?

Yes. Students get access to the OTS app for learning, check-ins, progress, and updates.

What if I do not improve?

If you follow the program and still do not see progress, you are covered by the money-back guarantee.
